---
title: 'WebCore: Architectural Support for Mobile Web Browsing'
author:
- Yuhao Zhu
- Matthew Halpern
- Vijay Janapa Reddi
categories:
- Show All
- Pre-2018 Work
topics:
- watt_wise_web
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/isca14.pdf
talk_source: https://speakerdeck.com/queeten/webcore-architectural-support-for-mobile-web-browsing
journ: ISCA
year: 2014
contrib: Pre-2018 Work
image: featured.png
teaser: https://speakerdeck.com/queeten/isca-2014-fastforward-session-talk
pub_number: 7
---
